issues.description: KO action missing cost restriction condition. Effect states 'K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the total of your and your opponent's Life cards' but DSL has no condition limiting target by cost comparison.
FlipLife condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' with count 1 or less (meaning 0-1 Life cards), not 'Always'. Effect explicitly states 'if you have 1 or less Life cards'.

FlipLife action is incorrect. Effect describes 'add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards' which should be handled via a specialized condition + draw/attach mechanic, not generic FlipLife. This appears to need SearchDeck or custom life-addition logic.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the total of your and your opponent's Life cards. Then, if you have 1 or less Life cards, add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards.
